title: DevOps Engineer – Cloud-Native, Automation, AI, Blockchain & Emerging Technologies
company_focus:
Global digital transformation consulting firm specializing
in financial services technology solutions
description:
Job Summary

Synechron is seeking a highly experienced DevOps Engineer
with a strong focus on emerging technologies such as
blockchain, IoT, and AI to lead innovative infrastructure
and automation projects. The role involves designing,
implementing, and managing advanced technology solutions,
mentoring teams, and promoting best practices aligning with
organizational strategies. Your expertise will drive
continuous improvement, enhance system reliability, and
support the organization’s digital transformation
objectives.

Software Requirements

Required:

- Proven experience with emerging technologies such as
  blockchain, IoT, or AI (8+ years)
- Extensive knowledge of software development lifecycle (SDLC)
  and DevOps tools for automation and deployment
- Strong understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
  and cloud-native architectures
- Experience in designing and implementing automation
  frameworks and infrastructure as code (IaC) solutions
- Expertise in containerization: Docker, Kubernetes
- Knowledge of monitoring and observability practices with
  tools like Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch
- Familiarity with security best practices: encryption,
  identity management, compliance standards

Preferred:

- Certifications in emerging technologies, cloud (e.g., AWS
  Certified Solutions Architect), or DevOps (e.g., CKAD,
  Azure DevOps Engineer)
- Experience supporting AI/ML deployment pipelines and model
  integration
- Skills in blockchain platform deployment or IoT device
  management

Overall Responsibilities

- Lead the development and deployment of innovative solutions
  using emerging technologies supporting cloud-native and
  DevOps best practices
- Mentor and guide teams in adopting automation,
  infrastructure as code, and continuous delivery
  methodologies
- Evaluate and implement new technology solutions to optimize
  business processes and system stability
- Design scalable, secure, and reliable architecture for
  critical enterprise systems
- Build and enhance automation frameworks and deployment
  pipelines supporting iterative releases
- Support system monitoring, incident response, and
  troubleshooting to ensure high availability and security
- Promote best practices in security, compliance, and
  operational excellence
- Contribute to strategic planning, capacity forecasting, and
  technology adoption initiatives
- Keep abreast of industry trends and emerging tools
  supporting innovation and organizational growth
- Drive continuous process improvement and automation
  initiatives aligned with strategic goals

Technical Skills (By Category)

Emerging Technologies (Essential):

- Blockchain, IoT, or AI/ML solution deployment and management
  (8+ years)
- Cloud platform architectures: AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible

Preferred:

- Blockchain frameworks (e.g., Hyperledger, Ethereum)
- AI/ML deployment pipelines and model management tools

Containers & Orchestration:

- Docker, Kubernetes (preferred)

Monitoring & Observability:

- Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry

Security & Compliance:

- Encryption, identity management, security best practices
  aligning with industry standards

DevOps & Automation:

- CI/CD pipelines: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps
- Automation scripting: Python, Shell, PowerShell

Experience Requirements

- 8+ years in infrastructure, DevOps, or platform engineering
  roles supporting emerging technologies
- Proven ability to design and deploy cloud-native solutions
  with automation and IaC strategies
- Experience managing large-scale, secure, and compliant
  enterprise systems in regulated industries
- Demonstrated leadership in automation, infrastructure as
  code, and system performance tuning
- Experience supporting AI/ML deployment pipelines,
  blockchain, or IoT solutions preferred

Day-to-Day Activities

- Architect and implement solutions combining cloud,
  blockchain, IoT, or AI to meet enterprise needs
- Develop, automate, and optimize deployment pipelines
  supporting continuous integration and delivery
- Manage infrastructure and applications supporting system
  security, compliance, and operational reliability
- Monitor system performance, troubleshoot incidents, and
  respond to security threats proactively
- Lead technical evaluations, proof-of-concept projects, and
  design workshops
- Mentor team members and promote best practices across
  technology initiatives
- Stay updated on technological trends, emerging tools, and
  industry standards to innovate and improve solutions

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Cloud
  Computing, or a related field
- 8+ years supporting enterprise platform solutions with
  emerging technologies focus
- Industry certifications such as AWS Solutions Architect,
  Azure Solutions Architect, or relevant DevOps
  certifications preferred
- Proven experience deploying scalable, secure, and compliant
  solutions on cloud platforms supporting enterprise
  standards

Professional Competencies

- Critical thinking and problem-solving skills for complex
  infrastructure and deployment challenges
- Leadership capabilities to guide teams and influence
  strategic technology decisions
- Strong communication skills for stakeholder engagement and
  technical documentation
- Adaptability to evolving industry standards, security
  regulations, and technological innovations
- Innovative mindset with a focus on automation, security, and
  operational excellence
- Time management skills for balancing multiple strategic
  initiatives

SYNECHRON’S DIVERSITY & INCLUSION STATEMENT


Diversity & Inclusion are fundamental to our culture, and
Synechron is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and
is an affirmative action employer. Our Diversity, Equity,
and Inclusion (DEI) initiative ‘Same Difference’ is
committed to fostering an inclusive culture – promoting
equality, diversity and an environment that is respectful to
all. We strongly believe that a diverse workforce helps
build stronger, successful businesses as a global company.
We encourage applicants from across diverse backgrounds,
race, ethnicities, religion, age, marital status, gender,
sexual orientations, or disabilities to apply. We empower
our global workforce by offering flexible workplace
arrangements, mentoring, internal mobility, learning and
development programs, and more.

All employment decisions at Synechron are based on business
needs, job requirements and individual qualifications,
without regard to the applicant’s gender, gender identity,
sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran
status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Candidate Application Notice

Design scalable, secure, and reliable architecture for critical enterprise systems
Build and enhance automation frameworks and deployment pipelines supporting iterative releases
Support system monitoring, incident response, and troubleshooting to ensure high availability and security
Architect and implement solutions combining cloud, blockchain, IoT, or AI to meet enterprise needs
Develop, automate, and optimize deployment pipelines supporting continuous integration and delivery
Lead technical evaluations, proof-of-concept projects, and design workshops
use_cases: Cloud-native infrastructure automation for emerging technologies
AI/ML deployment pipeline support and model integration
Enterprise system reliability and security compliance
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a DevOps/Infrastructure role focused on building
platforms and deployment pipelines that support AI/ML
workloads, blockchain, and IoT. The role involves supporting
AI/ML deployment pipelines and model integration, but does
not involve building, training, fine-tuning, or deploying
the actual AI models themselves. This is enabling
infrastructure for others who work on AI.
